## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Monograph and GrowthX to review content performance and discuss SEO strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows positive trends: 5x increase in sessions, 18-place average position improvement for non-branded search](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Project management content pillar seeing strong growth (700% engagement increase)](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [AI platform recognition for GrowthX content up 2.7x (25 to 68 citations)](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [Exploring potential for hub-and-spoke content model and high-intent, niche content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [5x increase in sessions from August to September](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [18-place average position improvement for non-branded search](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [2.3x week-over-week growth acceleration](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [60% overall engagement rate on GrowthX content (above 50% industry average)](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [30% share of voice with AI platforms, leading competitors in tracked keywords](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)

### Google Search Console Reporting Changes

  - [Impressions showing anomalous decrease due to Google's pagination reset](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [CTR improved despite impression decrease (44.44%, close to industry standard)](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
  - [Team monitoring to determine if this is the new baseline or if impressions will rebound](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)

### Content Pillar Performance

  - [Project management content seeing 700% engagement growth](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [Software comparisons and AI content pillars showing strength](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
  - [Team expanding on successful pillars based on performance data](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)

### SEO and Content Strategy Discussion

  - [Exploring hub-and-spoke model potential for Monograph](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [Focus on clear, encapsulated answers within articles (600-800 token chunks) for LLM optimization](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
  - [Considering development of high-intent, niche content opportunities (e.g., AI pricing model index)](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)

### LLM and AI Platform Performance

  - [76% engagement rate on GrowthX content via LLMs (vs. 60% site average)](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Positive sentiment in AI platform citations, indicating strong reputation](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [Recent decrease in Reddit referrals from LLMs noted (potential industry-wide trend)](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=2154.0)

### FAQ and Content Structure for LLMs

  - [Experimenting with FAQ vs. key takeaways placement for optimal LLM performance](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=2252.0)
  - [Best practice currently suggests including either FAQs or key takeaways for easy 600-token chunk answers](https://fathom.video/share/zqSZgS9BFkU49NzC3y7sa5TEW7Me4MMs?tab=summary&timestamp=2252.0)

## Next Steps
